<!--
For the PR that bumps manifest.json's `version` field: the text between the RN markers
below becomes the top of that version's GitHub Release notes.

Don't add your own "What's Changed" heading inside the markers — the release workflow
appends the auto-generated "What's Changed" PR list right after your text, so one is
already added for you.
-->

<!-- RN Start -->
Summary of what's included in this release.

<!-- RN Stop -->
